summary_en: 77,500 shares (0.40% of issued shares outstanding) to be acquired via ToSTNeT-3 on 2026-05-28 at ¥464/share, total consideration ¥35.96M. Method: off-hours auction (ToSTNeT-3), settlement same-day morning. Rationale: to mitigate short-term supply impact from shareholder equity sale and enable flexible capital policy execution.
title_en: Notice regarding acquisition of treasury shares and purchase of treasury shares via off-hours trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: Nihon Plast Co. announced on 2026-05-27 (via board resolution) a single-block treasury share acquisition totaling 77,500 shares (0.40% of issued shares outstanding, excluding treasury) at ¥464 per share (the previous day's closing price), for an aggregate consideration of ¥35.96M. The purchase will occur via ToSTNeT-3 (off-hours auction) on the morning of 2026-05-28, with order entry at 08:45 JST and results published immediately after session close. The company stated the acquisition is intended to mitigate near-term supply-demand effects stemming from a shareholder's planned equity sale and to preserve operational flexibility for future capital allocation decisions. The block size and price are fixed; no adjustment or partial execution guarantee is provided, though market conditions may prevent full execution.
